## [00:00 - 00:21]

Think about it closed number two. Hey, I understand you need to think about it. However, understand that thinking about it will not change the fact that this purchase saves you money, your company needs it, and sooner or later you're going to do it. Let's get it done now so you can think about all the other things that need your attention. I need your approval here and here.
